verdict.reason: Best combined score from the checked sources: Rare window session, High confidence, with no major blocker for Belgas.

wetsuit.reason: 4/3 remains the safer default for Peniche unless water is warm and wind is light.

best.explanation: Belgas looks like a clean fun-sized north coast window for Rare window, High confidence: 0.6-0.9 m, 106 kJ, 13 s period, workable consistency 59/100, and good wind at 6 km/h.  An open beach break where the sandbanks decide everything; this is best for quiet, punchy peaks when Lagide is too small, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Expect: scan from the dunes first because banks and channels shift fast.
best.shortExplanation: Belgas is an open beach break where the sandbanks decide everything · label Rare window, High confidence · 0.6-0.9 m · 106 kJ · 13 s period · good wind at 6 km/h.

ranked.explanation: Almagreira looks like a clean fun-sized north coast window for Rare window, Medium confidence: 0.6-0.9 m, 101 kJ, 13 s period, workable consistency 53/100, and good wind at 6 km/h.  An exposed north-coast beach break with more raw swell than Baleal; this is best for small, clean north-coast days when protected spots look underpowered, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Expect: banks, rips and wind exposure decide whether it is magic or messy.
ranked.shortExplanation: Almagreira is an exposed north-coast beach break with more raw swell than Baleal · label Rare window, Medium confidence · 0.6-0.9 m · 101 kJ · 13 s period · good wind at 6 km/h.

ranked.explanation: Lagide looks like a clean fun-sized window for Fun progression, Medium confidence: 0.6-0.9 m, 113 kJ, 12 s period, workable consistency 51/100, and good wind at 10 km/h.  A dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides; this is best for clean, playful walls when the bigger beaches are too wild or too small.  Expect: it can get busy, and it is usually more flow than heavy barrel.
ranked.shortExplanation: Lagide is a dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides · label Fun progression, Medium confidence · 0.6-0.9 m · 113 kJ · 12 s period · good wind at 10 km/h.

ranked.explanation: Supertubos looks like a clean fun-sized window for Worth checking, High confidence: 0.6-0.9 m, 38 kJ, 13 s period, lully 5/100, and good wind at 4 km/h.  A fast, hollow sand-bottom wave that gets serious quickly; this is best for short, punchy bodyboard barrels when it is small enough for comfort.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully.
ranked.shortExplanation: Supertubos is a fast, hollow sand-bottom wave that gets serious quickly · label Worth checking, High confidence · 0.6-0.9 m · 38 kJ · 13 s period · good wind at 4 km/h · Watch: Surfline consistency is lully.
